name: uwu-crypt
description: High-performance file encryption for Obsidian using Rust WASM.

scripts.build: cross-env RUSTFLAGS="-C target-feature=+simd128" wasm-pack build --target web --release --out-dir pkg && npx tsc && node esbuild.config.mjs production
scripts.wasm:build: cross-env RUSTFLAGS="-C target-feature=+simd128" wasm-pack build --target web --out-dir pkg
